words.def: a journey or route all the way around a particular place or area
words.zh: n. 旅遊, 觀光旅行, 任期

words.def: a state of decay usually accompanied by an offensive odor
words.zh: n. 腐爛, 腐蝕, 敗壞

words.def: (baseball) a failure by a batter or runner to reach a base safely in baseball
words.zh: a. 外面的, 熄滅的, 結束的
